N_{\text{rect}}=\binom{6}{2}\times\binom{6}{2}=15\times15=225 .

Two rectangles must be completely disjoint (no interior overlap, no common edge, no common vertex).  
Thus one rectangle must be **strictly** left of the other, or strictly below it (or both).
